target.title: fix(anthropic): accept Claude CLI apiKeyHelper auth
target.body:
Fixes #97489

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running Anthropic models through the Claude CLI backend would hit `missing-provider-auth` before `claude` was spawned when their Claude Code auth came from `~/.claude/settings.json` `apiKeyHelper` instead of macOS Keychain or `~/.claude/.credentials.json`.

## Why This Change Was Made

Claude Code documents `apiKeyHelper` as a supported CLI credential source for dynamic credentials, so OpenClaw now treats a non-empty `apiKeyHelper` setting as Claude CLI-managed auth evidence in the shared Claude CLI credential reader. The Anthropic `claude-cli` synthetic auth path uses a non-secret marker for that credential shape; the marker is registered in the bundled Anthropic manifest so generic auth paths do not treat it as plaintext API-key material.

The follow-up commit also closes the status-surface gaps from review: auth labels no longer call helper auth OAuth, doctor reports helper auth as headless Claude auth, external OAuth profile sync still ignores helper-only credentials, and CLI auth epoch coverage proves helper presence participates in local auth-state fingerprinting. OpenClaw does not execute the helper, persist helper output, or expose the marker through generic Anthropic API auth profiles.

## User Impact

Users with proxy, vault, or rotating-key Claude CLI setups can start OpenClaw turns through `agentRuntime.id: "claude-cli"` without creating a dummy `.credentials.json` file just to satisfy OpenClaw's pre-spawn auth check. Status and doctor output now identify helper-backed auth without misleading users into an OAuth-only path.

## Evidence

- Source contract checked: Claude Code docs list `apiKeyHelper` as a custom credential script and include it in authentication precedence: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/iam#credential-management
- Addressed ClawSweeper finding: registered `openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper` in `extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json` `nonSecretAuthMarkers` and added marker coverage in `src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts`.
- Addressed status-surface gaps: added focused coverage in `src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts`, `src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.test.ts`, `src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts`, and `src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.test.ts`.
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/anthropic/cli-constants.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-migration.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-shared.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt src/agents/model-auth-label.ts src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.test.ts` -> `Finished in 398ms on 6 files using 6 threads.`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/model-auth-label.ts src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.test.ts` -> `All matched files use the correct format.`
- `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json','utf8')); console.log('json ok')"` -> `json ok`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/anthropic/cli-constants.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-migration.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-shared.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.ts extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/agents/model-auth-label.ts src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.test.ts`
- Import smoke: `pnpm exec tsx -e "void (async () => { await import('./src/agents/cli-credentials.ts'); await import('./extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts'); await import('./extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts'); await import('./extensions/anthropic/cli-migration.ts'); await import('./src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts'); console.log('import smoke ok'); })()"` -> `import smoke ok`
- Shared credential smoke with only `settings.json apiKeyHelper` and no `.credentials.json`: `pnpm exec tsx ... readClaudeCliCredentialsCached({homeDir, platform:'linux', allowKeychainPrompt:false})` -> `{"type":"api_key_helper","provider":"anthropic"}`
- Non-secret marker smoke: `pnpm exec tsx -e "import { isNonSecretApiKeyMarker, listKnownNonSecretApiKeyMarkers } from './src/agents/model-auth-markers.ts'; const marker='openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper'; console.log(JSON.stringify({recognized:isNonSecretApiKeyMarker(marker), listed:listKnownNonSecretApiKeyMarkers().includes(marker)}));"` -> `{"recognized":true,"listed":true}`
- Runtime auth gate smoke with only `settings.json apiKeyHelper`, no `.credentials.json`, and Anthropic env cleared: `pnpm exec tsx ... resolveApiKeyForProvider({provider:'claude-cli', cfg:{}, agentDir})` -> `{"apiKey":"openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper","source":"Claude CLI apiKeyHelper","mode":"api-key","profileId":null,"credentialsFile":false}`
- Status label smoke with only `settings.json apiKeyHelper`: `pnpm exec tsx ... resolveModelAuthLabel({provider:'claude-cli', cfg:{}, agentDir, includeExternalProfiles:false})` -> `api-key-helper (claude-cli)`
- Doctor smoke with injected helper credential: `pnpm exec tsx ... noteClaudeCliHealth(...)` -> `{"title":"Claude CLI","hasHelper":true,"hasLoginHint":false}`

Attempted but did not complete in this Windows worktree:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts --reporter=verbose` stopped after no output for more than 2 minutes.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts --reporter=verbose` stopped after no output for more than 1 minute.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts --reporter=dot` stopped after no output for more than 1 minute.
- `pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1` stopped after several minutes in repeated rolldown plugin timing output without test results.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.test.ts` stopped after no output for more than 90 seconds.
- `pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts --testNamePattern "apiKeyHelper"` stopped after repeated rolldown plugin timing output without test results.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` stopped after more than 2 minutes with no output.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo` stopped after more than 2 minutes with no output.
